HIV.VaultEmpty: Drag layer or tool icons here to hide them
HIV.Settings.VaultPositionHint: Where to place the vault button in the Scene Controls bar.
HIV.Settings.ShowSeparator: Show section labels in vault panel
HIV.Settings.ShowSeparatorHint: Show section headers (Hidden Layers / tool group names) inside the vault panel.
HIV.Settings.TabVaultEnabledHint: Add a vault button to the sidebar tabs bar. Drag any tab icon into it to hide that tab from the sidebar.
HIV.Settings.BadgeStyleHint: How the vault button indicates it has hidden items.
HIV.Settings.BadgeStyleCount: Count — show number of hidden items
HIV.Settings.BadgeColorHint: Color used to tint the vault icon when Badge Style is set to Color. Enter a hex code or use the color picker.
